title: Jar Opener for Weak Hands, Seniors with Arthritis, 5 in 1 Multi Function Bottle Opener Lid Opener For Arthritic Hands with Non Slip Rubber Jar opener Gripper Pad and Corkscrew Wine Opener(BLUE)
description:
About this item
Specially designed for weak hands - It’s difficult for seniors and arthritis, rheumatoid sufferers, limited hand strength mobility or hand injuries sufferers to complete everyday tasks, especially while cooking. The HUMANFUN set will give your hands the power to open any jar, can or bottle. practical, convenient, save your time and strength, and putting NO extra stress on your fragile hand joint and ligaments!
Ergonomic design - The long handles will provide the strength and leverage you need to open effortlessly, the nonslip handles will ensure safety even when wet, the jar grip will provide superior grip when opening stubborn jars and containers of all sizes.
Easy to use - Place the opener on the lid in the right size, turn it around and easily open the seal, or pull it with the lid opener, it won't slip and save effort. Moreover, it makes us avoid the risk of using a knife to open the lid and lower the chance of hurting.
Open multiple size containers - From small medicine bottles, water and soda bottle, soup cans, cans of cat food, pickles, vacuum sealed jars such as spaghetti sauce, honey, and those slippery smooth ridge lids such as peanut butter.. There is literally nothing you can't open!
Packaging information - You will receive a 4- in- 1 Jar opener, a 5-in-1 Bottle operer, a 3- in- 1 Wine opener and Non Slip Jar Opener Gripper Pad, These tools can be easily stored or hung anywhere without regular maintenance, reusable and useful, It is an indispensable multifunctional kitchen tool in life, enough to meet your daily family needs; it can also be used as a great gift for parents, grandparents, girlfriends, other colleagues and friends.
reviews_5s: These jar and bottle openers work very well and makes opening things easy for older people who have lost some strength in their hands. They are much better than some products we have purchased.Bought for my aunt who has wrist problems and it is the perfect size for her. It didn't cost much and was easy for her to do.Great item really does the job with ease! Great value. Do need better instructions for use— not very clear.This is great for opening tight jar lids.Good Price and Good Product bought this for senior family member with arthritic issues opening hard to open jarsThese are great for Seniors and those with weak hand grip.These tools are exactly what I need to painlessly open bottles and jars . Gives a poorthritic hands as boost.We both struggle with bottle caps mainly. And this has been a life saver.There are enough different routes of owners to open anything!Great devise. Works wells!!
reviews_1s: I bought this without reading reviews because someone recommended it. It just arrived. When I opened it I was surprised at the jar opener, the item I think we all anticipate. It's too small for jars. I'd call this false advertising.This opener would not open bottle water or bottle juice. Nothing !!If you have any jar that you need to open that you have then you need a bigger jarTotal garbage waist of money which makes it even more difficult to open the can then without it . Didn’t waist my time sending it back threw it outThe silicone grip does not last. I use this gripper for opening bottles of carbonated water and it lasted about 2 months. Will not repurchase.The one to open pull tabs is too thick to fit under the tab so you still have to use a different tool to get them open. The jar opener is a joke I have not been able to open any jar with it. The only thing that works is the pad but I already had that.I don't even know what to say. The suck.Did not work for a 3.5inch lid. Was looking for some thing to fitThis item is too small to work on even a medium sized lid (3.25 in.). All the extra junk that comes with this purchase is just "eye wash" so you think you are getting more for your money. The product fails at its main job to remove lids. The wine opener is a cheap knock off of a popular model.neither me or my daughter could open a simple op bottle!
